zh.lifeSummary: Blanche de Montgomery de Ponthieu於大約1123年出生在法國皮卡迪索姆沙吉利吉。她於1148年9月19日與Radulf de Brimeu在法國皮卡迪索姆阿別維爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1180年在法國帕-德-卡拉斯布利享年58歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Montgomery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and northern Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Sainte-Foy-de-Montgomery and Saint-Germain-de-Montgomery (Calvados). In Ireland this surname was present in the medieval period, died out, and was then reintroduced from Scotland in the 17th century. It has been Gaelicized in Ireland as Mac Iomaire and in Scotland as Mac Gumaraid.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: Ponthieu
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: variant of Ponthieu, a habitational name from Ponthieu, a region (former county) in Picardy, between the rivers Authie and Somme.

nameMeanings.name: Blanche
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a nickname for a blonde, from blanche, feminine of Old French blanc ‘white’ (of Germanic origin). It came to be associated with the notion of whiteness as indicating purity, and was introduced into England as a given name by the Normans. A pale complexion combined with light hair was long an ideal of beauty in Europe (compare Modern English fair, which at first meant ‘beautiful’ and then, from the 16th century, ‘light in colouring’).

en.lifeSummary: Blanche de Montgomery de Ponthieu was born about 1123, in Saint-Riquier, Somme, Picardie, France. She married Radulf de Brimeu on 19 September 1148, in Abbeville, Somme, Picardie, France. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. She died in 1180, in Brimeux, Pas-de-Calais, France, at the age of 58.

fr.lifeSummary: Blanche de Montgomery de Ponthieu est née environ 1123, à Saint-Riquier, Somme, Picardie, France. Elle a épousé Radulf de Brimeu le 19 septembre 1148, à Abbeville, Somme, Picardie, France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1180, à Brimeux, Pas-de-Calais, France, à l’âge de 58 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Blanche de Montgomery de Ponthieu wurde um 1123 in Saint-Riquier, Somme, Picardie, Frankreich geboren. Sie hat am 19. September 1148 in Abbeville, Somme, Picardie, Frankreich Radulf de Brimeu geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1180 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Brimeux, Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Blanche de Montgomery de Ponthieu è nata il circa 1123 nel Saint-Riquier, Somme, Picardie, Francia. Lei sposato Radulf de Brimeu il 19 settembre 1148, nel Abbeville, Somme, Picardie, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1180, nel Brimeux, Pas-de-Calais, Francia, all'età di 58 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Blanche de Montgomery de Ponthieuは約1123年にフランスピカーディソンメサイント-リクイエルで生まれた。1148年9月19日にフランスピカーディソンメアベヴィルでRadulf de Brimeuと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1180年にフランスプアス-デ-カレイスブリメウックスで58歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Blanche de Montgomery de Ponthieu(은)는 대략 1123년 프랑스 피카디 솜 세인트-리키어에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1148년 9월 19일 프랑스 피카디 솜 애브베빌에서 Radulf de Brimeu(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1180년 프랑스 파스-데-캘레이 브라임우스에서 58세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Blanche de Montgomery de Ponthieu nasceu aproximadamente 1123, em Saint-Riquier, Somme, Picardie, França. Ela casou-se com Radulf de Brimeu em 19 de setembro de 1148, em Abbeville, Somme, Picardie, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1180, em Brimeux, Pas-de-Calais, França, com 58 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Blanche de Montgomery de Ponthieu родилась около 1123 г. в местности сеинт-рикуиир, сомм, пикарди, Франция. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Radulf de Brimeu 19 сентября 1148 г. в местности эббевилл, сомм, пикарди, Франция. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1180 г. в местности бримеукс, пас-де-калеи, Франция в возрасте 58 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Blanche de Montgomery de Ponthieu nació aproximadamente 1123, en Saint-Riquier, Somme, Picardie, Francia. Se casó con Radulf de Brimeu el 19 de septiembre de 1148, en Abbeville, Somme, Picardie, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Murió en 1180, en Brimeux, Pas-de-Calais, Francia, a la edad de 58 años.
